title: Default to "Main Space" in Teams
excerpt:

posts.author: mondayuser6 (Jim)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve integrated with Teams and like most of what we see. When I click the monday.com app icon on the left menu, it automatically takes me to a chat tab, with “Main Space”, “Inbox”, and “About” as other tabs.

I would love the ability to default to the Main Space tab and even better, to the “My Work” or even “Home” section of the monday.com dashboard. We can see so many ways monday.com will help us, but it seems like the more we use it, the more we have to take extra clicks to get to what we’re doing.

Yes, we can utilize boards in chats and channels (which we don’t use much since we’re a small team) but just having the one overview of my tasks would be lovely. Thank you!
